pageSubtitle: Configure your AI assistant parameters and appearance
thinkingModeHint: When enabled, requests will include the enable_thinking parameter.
testConnectionHint: Check if API Key / Proxy is valid (will automatically authorize host).
modelsHint: Only "enabled" models will appear in the sidebar dropdown menu.
globalPermissionHint: Authorize access to all HTTP / HTTPS websites at once to avoid permission popups for each new website.
pageCaptureHint: Choose how page references are captured. "Smart Capture" automatically selects a token-saving strategy: reader-style Markdown for articles and visible structured text for product pages, pricing pages, dashboards, and other app-like pages. Use "Full Page" only when the cleaner modes miss important content.
pageContextLimitHint: Set the maximum number of characters sent to AI when referencing a page (recommended: 20000-100000), including page title, URL, body content, etc. Larger values capture more content but consume more tokens. Complex pages like Amazon recommend 100000 or higher.
pageContextLimitHint2: ✨ Virtual-scroll capture: The extension automatically detects virtual scrolling websites (such as Amazon, Twitter, Reddit, etc.) and uses intelligent scrolling mode to capture more complete content. After clicking the "Reference Page" button, the page may automatically scroll and accumulate content (takes 10-30 seconds). You can click multiple times to recapture the latest content.
floatBallHint: Display in the bottom-right corner of the sidebar. Click to quickly open settings.
freshChatOnPanelOpenToggle: Start a new chat when reopened
freshChatOnPanelOpenHint: Automatically start a new chat when the sidebar is reopened; turn this off to continue the previous chat.
shortcutHint: Click the button below to go to the shortcuts settings page to configure.
systemPromptsHint: Manage and quickly switch between different AI role behaviors.
promptVariableHint: 💡 System prompt defines the AI's role and rules. Your messages and referenced page content are sent separately — no variables needed.
promptVariables: Define the AI's role, personality, and rules. User input and page content are handled automatically.
modelThinkingParamsTitle:
Custom API Parameters (Optional)
Blank = default enable thinking
Fill in JSON to override, for example:
{"enable_thinking":false}
modelPrefixPromptTitle:
Prefix Prompt (Optional)
Automatically prepended to each message
e.g. /no_think
screenshotSelectHint: Drag to select. Double-click for full visible page. Esc to cancel.
screenshotTooLarge: Screenshot is too large. Please reduce the browser window size and try again.
waitingGrant: Please select "Allow" in the popup window
suggestion1: Give me a useless but fascinating fun fact 🎲
suggestion2: Give me something to say today that'll sound impressive 🎭
suggestion3: Give me a line that makes me sound deep and mysterious ✨
greetingMorningSub: Ready for action! What's your plan?
openclawWsHint:
Leave empty to use default: {{url}}
Enter OpenClaw Gateway URL (ws(s):// or http(s)://; http is converted to ws).
openclawUrlInvalid: Must start with http(s):// or ws(s)://
openclawSessionKeyHint: Select an OpenClaw Gateway Session to route to the specified Agent.
hermesSessionHint: Create a new Hermes server session and clear Momo's local Hermes chat history.
hermesNewSessionConfirm: Create a new Hermes session and clear Momo's local Hermes chat history?
hermesNewSessionRequiresConnect: Connect Hermes successfully before creating a new session.
openclawToggleHint: Once enabled, you can select OpenClaw Gateway from the provider list above.
tutorialServerDesc: Momo connects with Token Only (no device pairing). For remote gateways, configure ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json like below — then use the same token in Momo.
tutorialConfigNote: YOUR_HOST:PORT — same host/port as Momo’s Gateway URL (ws://YOUR_HOST:PORT; Momo sends http://YOUR_HOST:PORT as Origin). Include "null" for Chrome extension fallback. gateway.port must match your listen port. Set auth.token to your secret; paste the same value into Momo Gateway Token.
tutorialStep2: Restart or reload the gateway for changes to take effect.
tutorialStep3: In Momo: Gateway URL ws://YOUR_HOST:PORT (or http://, auto-converted), same Gateway Token, then Connect → pick a Session.
tutorialTokenWarning: Anyone with the token gets full access. Only use on local/trusted networks. Gateway must support protocol v4.
hermesTutorialServerDesc: Like OpenClaw, Hermes needs API Server values enabled in the Hermes .env, then the Hermes gateway must be restarted.
hermesTutorialStep1Note: Replace <your-secret-key> with your own secret, then enter the same value in Momo's API Server Key field.
hermesTutorialStep2: Restart the Hermes gateway so the .env changes take effect.
hermesTutorialStep3: Enter the Base URL in Momo, for example http://127.0.0.1:8642/v1 or your remote URL, then click Connect.
hermesTutorialWarning: API_SERVER_CORS_ORIGINS=* is the simplest working setting for Chrome extension / remote access. For public services, use stricter trusted origins.
pageLimitAlert: Character limit must be between 1000 and 200000
noApiKeyWarning: No API Key entered, testing Proxy connection only
permApiNotSupported: Browser does not support Permissions API
confirmReset: Reset to defaults and overwrite all prompts and models?
resetComplete: Reset to defaults ({{count}} prompts, models reset)
thinkingAlwaysOn: This model has built-in thinking and cannot be disabled
thinkingUnsupported: This model does not support thinking mode
virtualScrollWarning: ⚠️ Some pages use virtual scrolling — only content within the viewport at capture time was retrieved. Scroll to other areas and re-reference for more content.
confirmImport: Import will be appended to existing chats. Confirm?
streamingEditWarning: Streaming in progress. Stop before editing.
ttsNotSupported: Your browser does not support speech synthesis
imageUploadTooLarge: Image {{name}} is too large (over 5MB). Please compress it first.
webSearchSettingsHint: When web search is enabled in the sidebar, the extension searches only when the message looks like it needs fresh web information (news, prices, weather, explicit “search the web”, URLs, etc.). Results are added as context for the AI. When it is off, only explicit “search the web” style requests auto-trigger search.
webSearchProviderBrave: Brave Search API (Free 2000/month, API Key required)
simpleInternetSearchHint: When ON, uses search snippets only. When OFF, visits result pages for full content (slower but more accurate).
visitWebsiteInMessageHint: When ON, if a URL is found in the message, it will automatically fetch the page content and provide it to the AI.
internetSearchOnByDefaultHint: When ON, web search is enabled by default for every chat.
braveSearchApiKeyHint: Sign up for free at brave.com/search/api (2000 free searches per month, no credit card needed).
tavilyApiKeyHint: Sign up for free at tavily.com to get an API Key (1000 free searches per month).
ttsHint: Configure voice, speed and pitch for reading AI responses aloud.
ttsPreviewText: Hello, this is a voice preview test.
openclawMissingUrl: Please enter the OpenClaw Gateway WebSocket URL in settings.
openclawConnectFailed: Failed to connect to OpenClaw Gateway
openclawNoResponse: (OpenClaw did not respond. Please check Gateway connection and Agent settings.)
proxyUnreachableHint: Possible: Proxy unreachable / CORS / Network error.
invalidApiKeyHint: API Key invalid or Proxy not forwarding Authorization header.
proxyPermissionNeeded: Proxy host permission not granted. Please authorize in settings.
